transcript:
agent: Hey, thanks for calling Marceau Solutions! This is the AI assistant. How can I help you today?
user: William, this is Magali Bowman from Collier County Human Resources. If you could please give me a call back, my direct line is 239-252-8001.
agent: Hi Magali, it's great to hear from you! William isn't available to take calls right now, but I can certainly pass along your message and number. He'll get back to you as soon as he can, likely within twenty-four hours.
agent: Are you still there?
agent: It sounds like I might have lost you. Feel free to call...
user: Music
agent: I'm sorry, I can't play music for you. Is there something else I can help you with today?
agent: Are you still with me? Let me know if there's anything else you'd like to discuss!
agent: It seems like we might have gotten disconnected. Please feel free to call back anytime or visit marceausolutions.com. Have a great day!
agent: It sounds like I might have lost you. Feel free to call back anytime or visit marceausolutions.com. Have a great day!
agent: It sounds like I might have lost you. Feel free to call back anytime or visit marceausolutions.com. Have a great day!

collected_data.name: Magali Bowman
collected_data.key_message: William, this is Magali Bowman from Collier County Human Resources. If you could please give me a call back, my direct line is 239-252-8001.

summary: Magali Bowman from Collier County Human Resources called Marceau Solutions for William. The AI agent informed her William was unavailable but offered to relay her message and direct line (239-252-8001), stating William would return the call within 24 hours. The remainder of the conversation involved the user being unresponsive, leading the agent to conclude the call due to a presumed disconnection.
title: Leave message for William

transcript: agent: Hey, thanks for calling Marceau Solutions! This is the AI assistant. How can I help you today?
summary: The AI assistant for Marceau Solutions greeted the user and offered assistance.
title: AI Assistant Greeting

transcript:
agent: Hey, thanks for calling Marceau Solutions! This is the AI assistant. How can I help you today?
user: Hey, Will, it's your mother. Answer the phone.
agent: Oh, hi there! I'm actually William's AI assistant, not William himself. He's not available to take calls right now, but I can certainly help you or take a message for him. What can I do for you, Mom?
user: No, I don't want to talk to an AI. I want to talk to my son. He's got an AI problem

collected_data.key_message: Hey, Will, it's your mother. Answer the phone.

summary: The user, identifying as William's mother, called Marceau Solutions, believing she was speaking to her son. The AI assistant clarified its identity and offered to help or take a message. The user refused to interact with the AI, insisting on speaking directly to her son about an "AI problem."
title: AI Problem Call

transcript:
agent: Hey, thanks for calling Marceau Solutions! This is the AI assistant. How can I help you today?
agent: Hello? Are you still there?
summary: The AI agent initiated the conversation with a greeting. The user then sent an empty message, leading the agent to inquire if the user was still present.
title: User Silence
